scene: Hostile Gauls raid a farmstead at the chora's edge. Your unit is closest.

choices.label: Lead the counterattack
choices.resultText: Driven off. Two of yours wounded, none lost. The farm stands.

choices.label: Screen the civilians, let them go
choices.resultText: No graves dug today. Some call it wisdom, some call it else.

scene: The strategos orders extended phalanx drills in the summer heat. Men are grumbling.

choices.label: Drill hardest in the front rank
choices.resultText: Blisters now, survival later. The strategos notices.

choices.label: Find duties in the shade
choices.resultText: Inventory duty has its comforts. And its reputation.

scene: A shield-brother lies wounded and can't pay the healer. His family is proud and broke.

choices.label: Pay the healer quietly
choices.resultText: He walks again by autumn. The phalanx knows who paid, though no one says.

choices.label: Organize a collection in the unit
choices.resultText: Every man gives an obol. The unit grows tighter for it.

scene: After a successful action, the loot division turns ugly. Your share could be argued larger.

choices.label: Take the standard share
choices.resultText: Fair is remembered longer than rich.

choices.label: Argue for the larger cut
choices.resultText: You win the argument and lose a card game invitation. Permanently.

scene: A recruiter offers triple pay for a season guarding Carthaginian interests in Iberia.

choices.label: Take the contract
choices.resultText: Good silver, hard service, and questions waiting back home.

choices.label: Massalia's spear stays Massalia's
choices.resultText: The recruiter sails with other men. Your refusal is quoted at the barracks.

scene: On wall watch, you spot a figure climbing the wooden palisade with a bundle. Could be a smuggler. Could be worse.

choices.label: Sound the alarm and intercept
choices.resultText: A smuggler of untaxed silphium. The Ephors send commendation.

choices.label: Let him pass for a cut
choices.resultText: He pays. He will also remember which guard can be bought.

scene: A Gaulish champion, drunk on feast-mead, challenges any Greek to single combat outside the gates.

choices.label: Accept the challenge
choices.resultText: First blood yours. He laughs, clasps your arm, and buys the wine. Gauls.

choices.label: Walk away - the city forbids it
choices.resultText: Discipline over glory. The Gaul shouts something probably unflattering.

scene: A file-leader position opens. The strategos weighs you against a rival with better connections.

choices.label: Let your record speak
choices.resultText: The strategos reads records after all. The file is yours.

choices.label: Lobby through your House
choices.resultText: Strings pulled, position won, rival watching.

scene: A smith offers a bronze cuirass of real quality - at a price that empties your purse.

choices.label: Buy it - armor is life
choices.resultText: It fits like a second skin. Worth every starving week.

choices.label: Keep your father's old panoply
choices.resultText: Dented where it saved him. That counts for something bronze can't buy.

scene: A crippled veteran of the old wars begs at the gate your unit guards. Some say move him along.

choices.label: Stand him a meal and hear his stories
choices.resultText: He fought at the Rhone. The tactics he describes are not in any drill.

choices.label: Move him along per orders
choices.resultText: Orders followed. His look follows you longer.
